resources.string: You logged %d cups yesterday. Log in to save.
Notify before your predicted next period
A daily reminder at your chosen time
Remind to log water during the day

Enabling this reminder stores your predicted period date in unencrypted local storage so background checks can run without your passphrase. Notifications may appear on your lock screen. No data leaves your device.
Notification permission is needed to send reminders.
Start by rating your mood or energy, or log your water intake.
Swipe or tap to dismiss and start logging.
Are you sure you want to permanently delete this period and all its associated flow logs? This action cannot be undone.

This day has logged flow, color, or consistency data. Removing it as a period day will permanently delete that data.\n\nYour other daily log entries (mood, symptoms, medications, notes) will not be affected.
Remove %1$d period days? %2$d of them have logged flow, color, or consistency data that will be permanently deleted.\n\nYour other daily log entries will not be affected.
Long press a day to start/mark your period. Tap to log details.
Long press a day to toggle period. Press and drag to select a range.
Toggle above to log period details
Log your mood, energy, and water intake
Add tags or notes about your day
How are you feeling? Any observations?
Failed to save symptom. Please try again.
Failed to save medication. Please try again.
This symptom appears in %d daily logs. Deleting it will permanently remove those log entries.
This symptom has no logged entries. Delete it from your library?
A symptom with this name already exists
This medication appears in %d daily logs. Deleting it will permanently remove those log entries.
This medication has no logged entries. Delete it from your library?
A medication with this name already exists
This is your daily log. We\'ve added demo data so you can explore. Let\'s walk through the features.
Tap one of the stars below to rate your mood from 1 to 5.
Tap one of the stars below to rate your energy level from 1 to 5.
Tap the + button below to log a cup of water.
Each tab focuses on a different part of your day. You can swipe or tap any tab to switch.
Tap the Period tab above to explore period tracking.
Tap the toggle switch below to mark today as a period day.
Tap the Symptoms tab above to continue.
Tap the Medications tab above to continue.
This is your private journal - add freeform notes or quick tags to remember anything about your day.
No problem - you can still track mood, energy, symptoms, and more.
Your cycle calendar shows periods, predicted phases, and daily data at a glance.
Tap the left or right arrow to move between months, or tap the Today button to jump back.
Each color in the legend represents a different cycle phase. You can customize these in Settings.
Press and hold any day on the calendar to mark it as a period day. Try it now!
After pressing and holding, drag your finger across multiple days to mark or unmark a range at once.
Press and hold the first or last day of a period, then drag inward to shorten or outward to extend.
Tap any day on the calendar to see a summary of what you logged. From there you can open the full daily log.
Currently locked - unlock to access secured data.
Unlock the app to use developer tools.
Display mood score in daily log summary
Display energy level in daily log summary
Display libido score in daily log summary
Show Follicular phase tint on the calendar
Show Ovulation phase tint on the calendar
Show Luteal phase tint on the calendar
Show the guided walkthrough again next time you open a screen
Your Data Stays on This Device

RhythmWise stores everything you track right here on your phone. Your cycle data, symptoms, moods, and notes never leave this device. There is no account, no cloud sync, and no way for anyone (including us) to see your information.\n\nTo keep your data safe, the app encrypts it with a passphrase that only you know. Think of it as a lock on a private journal. Without the right passphrase, the data is unreadable.
Choosing a Passphrase You Will Remember

A good passphrase is a short phrase that is easy for you to picture but hard for someone else to guess.

**How to build one:**
- Pick 4 or 5 unrelated words and string them together. "purple dog Tuesday pancake" is much stronger than a short password with special characters
- Add a personal twist that helps it stick in your mind. Maybe swap a word for something only you would think of, or picture a silly scene
- Avoid names, birthdays, and common phrases. "ILoveYou123" is one of the first things an attacker would try

**Why this works:** Length beats complexity. A passphrase with 4 random words is far stronger than "P@ssw0rd!" and much easier to type on a phone.

If you forget your passphrase, your data cannot be recovered. There is no reset button, no recovery email, and no back door. This is intentional.

The same encryption that keeps your data private means that nobody, not even this app, can unlock it without the correct passphrase.

**Before you continue:**
- Make sure you have a passphrase you are confident you will remember
- Consider writing it down and keeping it somewhere safe and private until you have it memorized
- Once you have it memorized, destroy the written copy
Passphrase must be at least 8 characters
Not enough data to generate insights yet. Keep tracking!
Start tracking your cycle to see patterns and predictions here.
This app is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any medical condition. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
Content adapted from U.S. government public domain materials.

Educational content in this app is sourced from the U.S. Office on Women\'s Health (womenshealth.gov) and the National Institute of Child Health and Human Development (nichd.nih.gov). These materials are in the public domain.
Tap a day to view or create a daily log
Swipe left or right to change months, or use the arrow buttons
Tap \"Today\" to jump back to the current month
Long-press a day to mark or unmark it as a period day
Long-press and drag across days to select a range of period days
Use the heatmap selector below the calendar to overlay data like mood, energy, or flow intensity
Tap a symptom chip to log it for today - tap again to remove
Tap the \"+\" chip to create a new custom symptom
Long-press a symptom chip to rename or delete it
Tap a medication chip to log it for today - tap again to remove
Tap the \"+\" chip to create a new custom medication
Long-press a medication chip to rename or delete it
Tap a tag chip to apply it to today\'s log - tap again to remove
Tap the \"+\" chip to create a new custom tag
Long-press a tag chip to rename or delete it
Use the notes field below to write freeform observations about your day

Privacy Policy
Effective Date: February 28, 2026

RhythmWise is a privacy-first menstrual cycle tracker. This policy explains what data the app handles and how it protects your information.

1. Data We Collect

RhythmWise stores the following data that you enter:

• Menstrual cycle start and end dates
• Flow intensity, color, and consistency
• Mood, energy, and libido ratings
• Symptoms and symptom severity
• Medications and dosage notes
• Water intake
• Custom tags and freeform notes

The app does not collect your name, email address, location, device identifiers, or any other personal information beyond what you explicitly enter.

2. How Your Data Is Stored

All data is stored locally on your device only. The app uses SQLCipher to encrypt the database with AES-256-GCM. Your passphrase is processed through Argon2id key derivation (64 MB memory cost, 3 iterations) to produce the encryption key. The encrypted database never leaves your device.

3. No Network Access

RhythmWise requests zero internet permissions. The app cannot connect to the internet. There is no cloud sync, no remote backup, no telemetry, no analytics, no crash reporting, and no third-party SDKs that transmit data.

4. Your Passphrase

Your passphrase never leaves your device and is never stored in plain text. It is used solely to derive the encryption key in memory, and the key is zeroized when you lock the app or the session ends.

There is no passphrase recovery mechanism. If you forget your passphrase, your data cannot be recovered. This is by design.

5. Data Retention

Your data persists on your device until you choose to delete it. You can delete individual daily log entries, delete entire period records, or uninstall the app to remove all data.

6. Your Rights

Because all data is local to your device, you have complete control. You can view, delete, or remove all data at any time.

7. Children's Privacy

RhythmWise does not knowingly collect data from children under 13. The app does not collect any identifying information from any user.

8. Medical Disclaimer

This app is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Cycle predictions and insights are based on statistical patterns in your self-reported data and may not be accurate. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for medical decisions. Do not rely on this app for contraception, fertility planning, or diagnosing any medical condition.

9. Changes to This Policy

If this policy is updated, the new version will be included in the app update. The effective date at the top of this document will be revised accordingly.

10. Contact

RhythmWise is an open-source project. If you have questions about this privacy policy, please open an issue on the project's GitHub repository.

Terms of Service
Effective Date: February 28, 2026

By using RhythmWise, you agree to the following terms.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By installing or using the app, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the app.

2. Description of Service

RhythmWise is a local-only menstrual cycle tracking application. All data is stored and encrypted on your device. The app does not connect to the internet and does not provide any online services.

3. Medical Disclaimer

This app is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Cycle predictions and insights are based on statistical patterns in your self-reported data and may not be accurate. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for medical decisions. Do not rely on this app for contraception, fertility planning, or diagnosing any medical condition.

4. User Responsibility for Passphrase

You are solely responsible for creating and remembering your passphrase. The app uses your passphrase to encrypt your data. There is no passphrase recovery, no reset mechanism, and no back door.

If you forget your passphrase, your data cannot be recovered by anyone, including the app developers. You acknowledge and accept this risk.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties

The app is provided on an "as-is" and "as-available" basis, without warranties of any kind, whether express, implied, or statutory. This includes, but is not limited to, implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall the developers or contributors be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of data, loss of profits, or personal injury, arising out of or in connection with your use of the app.

7. Data and Privacy

Your use of the app is also governed by the Privacy Policy. The app does not collect, transmit, or store any data outside of your device.

8. Modifications

The developers reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the app at any time without notice. These Terms of Service may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

9. Open Source License

RhythmWise is licensed under the Apache License 2.0. Your use of the source code is subject to the terms of that license.

10. Governing Law

These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which you reside, without regard to conflict of law principles.

11. Contact

If you have questions about these terms, please open an issue on the project's GitHub repository.
Update the passphrase that protects your data
Passphrase must be at least 8 characters

Are you sure you want to change your passphrase?\n\nThis will re-encrypt your entire database with a new key. If you forget your new passphrase, your data will be permanently inaccessible. There is no recovery mechanism.
This is your last chance to write down or memorize your new passphrase. Once you dismiss this dialog, it cannot be shown again.\n\nThere is no passphrase recovery.
Something went wrong. Your data is still protected by your current passphrase. Please try again.
The change could not be verified and was rolled back. Your current passphrase still works. Please try again.
Permanently erase all data and return to a fresh install

This will permanently and irreversibly delete all of your data, including cycle history, daily logs, symptoms, medications, notes, preferences, and your encryption key.\n\nThis cannot be undone. The app will return to its initial setup screen as if freshly installed.
Type DELETE below to confirm that you want to permanently erase all data.
